user_message: Add MLOps to month 4 of my data science roadmap and save it.

session_history.content: Help me build a data science roadmap.
I'll use your profile and create a six-month plan.

Transfer learning is a machine learning technique where a model developed for one task is reused as the starting point for a model on a second task. (Long off-topic tutorial — should be evicted or compressed by your context policy.)
Month 3 covers regression, classification, and model evaluation.
